text:
On Thu, Oct 26, 2006 at 07:22:41PM +0100, Robert Watson wrote:
> On Thu, 26 Oct 2006, Diane Bruce wrote:
>
> >Panic String: mtx_lock() of destroyed mutex @
> >/usr/src/sys/netinet/ip_output.c:1198
> >
...

Now an even more amusing core!
